tool_args.label: MTA Report - Crime Statistics December / January thru December

payload.title: MTA Report - CRIME STATISTICS DECEMBER / JANUARY THRU DECEMBER
payload.publisher: Police Department City of New York
payload.description: NYPD crime statistics report for the MTA, covering December and January-December crime data for 2025 vs 2024, plus arrest/summons activity, historical data 1997-2025, and HCTF Transit Summary hate crime statistics.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
